description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages (Prod Deploy, Stage Deploy, Utilities) using php:7.2 for PHP jobs and node:10 for Node jobs. In the Prod Deploy stage add a Prod Deploy API job that runs only on the master branch, executes apt-get update && apt-get install -y lftp zip curl wget, runs the Composer installer (php -r "copy('https://getcomposer.org/installer','composer-setup.php');" && php composer-setup.php && php -r "unlink('composer-setup.php');"), installs production dependencies with php composer.phar install --no-dev, then runs ci/prod/deploy_backend.sh, stores the backend/ directory as an artifact and deploys to the Production API environment at https://www.hitmaps.com/api. Also in Prod Deploy add a Prod Deploy Frontend job that runs only on master, uses node:10, runs apt-get update && apt-get install -y lftp zip curl nodejs wget, installs Node dependencies with npm ci, builds the frontend with npm run build, then runs ci/prod/deploy_frontend.sh, stores the frontend/ directory as an artifact and deploys to the Production Frontend environment at https://www.hitmaps.com. In the Utilities stage add a manual Refresh Stage DB job that runs only on the stage branch, uses php:7.2, and downloads https://test.hitmaps.com/refresh-stage-db.php?access-key=$ACCESS_KEY via wget. In the Stage Deploy stage add a Stage Deploy API job that runs only on the stage branch, repeats the same apt-get, Composer install, and php composer.phar install --no-dev steps as the production API job, then runs ci/stage/deploy_backend.sh, stores backend/ as an artifact and deploys to the Staging API environment at https://test.hitmaps.com/api. Also add a Stage Deploy Frontend job that runs only on the stage branch, uses node:10, runs apt-get update && apt-get install -y lftp zip curl nodejs wget, installs dependencies with npm ci, runs npm run staging, then executes ci/stage/deploy_frontend.sh, stores frontend/ as an artifact and deploys to the Staging Frontend environment at https://test.hitmaps.com.
